benefits.description: Added 30 lbs since August; described as the leanest bulk ever done after years of attempts at clean and dirty bulking
Confident it will not take long to cut the gained weight if needed; implies lean composition of weight gained

protocol_notes: User does not explicitly name the compound(s) used but is responding in context of the Tesamorelin + MOTS-C + Retatrutide stack discussion. Timeframe: approximately 7 months (since August). Outcome: +30 lbs on the leanest bulk of their experience.
